summary: Migrated drbi.org from static Astro to hybrid SSR with Turso (LibSQL) as live CMS database. All 15 planned tasks completed: schema migration, seed scripts, events/content APIs rewritten to use Turso, [slug].astro converted to SSR, utils.js wired to Turso, admin events pages updated, edge cache headers added. Build passing, 116/125 behavioral tests pass (8 pending require admin credentials).
